JavaScript tests for left shift bitwise operations with various operand types and conditions.


## Files
- **[11.07.01-001.js](11.07.01-001.js.md)**: Tests the left shift bitwise operation in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.01-003.js](11.07.01-003.js.md)**: Tests bitwise left shift and addition operations in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.01-004.js](11.07.01-004.js.md)**: Tests left shift operation with a string operand in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.01-005.js](11.07.01-005.js.md)**: Tests bitwise left shift operation in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.01-006.js](11.07.01-006.js.md)**: Tests left shift operation on a null variable in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.01-007.js](11.07.01-007.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the left shift operator with a null operand in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.01-008.js](11.07.01-008.js.md)**: Tests bitwise left shift operation with a boolean in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.01-009.js](11.07.01-009.js.md)**: Tests left bitwise shift operation with a negative shift count in JavaScript.
